allow: Bash(which gradle 2>/dev/null; java -version 2>&1 | head -1; which java)
Bash(brew list gradle 2>/dev/null || brew install gradle 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/P7dR8mSH/version?game_versions=%5B%221.21.11%22%5D&loaders=%5B%22fabric%22%5D" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(v['version_number'], v['date_published'][:10]\) for v in data[:5]]")
Bash(curl -s "https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/yarn/1.21.11" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(v['version']\) for v in data[:5]]")
Bash(git init && git remote add origin git@github.com:jeff-hutting/strata.git && git status)
Bash(git add .gitignore README.md build.gradle settings.gradle gradle.properties gradle/ gradlew gradlew.bat docs/ strata-core/ .claude/)
